titleStmt.title: SII 27.141: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 141. (A.R. No. 495 of 1928-29.) NĪLĀVARA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of Mahishāsuramardini temple.
This is dated Śaka 1975, Tāraṇa, Phālguṇa, ba. Pañchami. The given Śaka year is a mistake for 1386 which corresponds to 1464 A.D.

It registers a gift of taxes made in the presence of the goddess Durgā-Bhagavatī at Niruvāra by Paṇḍaridēva-oḍeya under the orders of mahamaṇḍaleśvara Rāmachandra-daṇṇāyaka when the king was stated to be ruling from the capital of Dōra-samudra. It also mentions the hadināru of [Mā]ḷa-grāma and three hundred jagattu and pradhāni Viṭharasa-oḍeya, karaṇika Bāyappa and the sixteen of the village as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
bhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1975 neya tāraṇa saṁvatsarada phālguṇa bahuḷa paThe ṣaka year is obviously a mistake for
ṁcamiyalu śrī mahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara pūrva dakṣiṇa paścima
samudrādhīśvaraṁ Arirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣege tappuvarāyara gaṁ
ḍa śrī vīramallikārjunarāyaru dōra samudrada nelevīḍinalu suka
saṁkatā vinōdadiṁ rājyavanu pratipālisuvakāladalu śrī
maṁnmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara Ārirāyavibhāḍa bhāṣage tappuvarāyaraga
ṁḍa śrī rāmacaṁdra daṇāyakara nirūpadiṁda niruvārada durggābhaga
vatiya saṁnidhiyalu barasida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare paṁḍaridē
va Oḍeyaru niruvārada hadahāḷiya nirisi sudanaṣṭavāgi keṭṭadakkemā
ḍida māḷagrāma hadināṟu jagattu mūnūṟakke kāratiṁgaḷige Āṇiku
ḍi yeṁ salladeṁdu duśāsanavanu durgābhagavatiyastānada
li nālakumukālu vaṭi na muṁdiṭṭu Oppi barasida śilāśāsana
yi śāsana pramāṇadali Arasina haṇa haḍikeyanu beḷeya mēle tiddu
varu yidakke Ā grāma hadināṟu jagatu munūraroḷage Ārobaru Ārasi
na haṇa haḍikege Āḍabiddu yeṇutoṇiṁge Oyidare Arasiṁge
nūṟayippattu honnatettu maṭhake yi śāsana pramāṇakke niluvaru nilade
vara bāḷu samasta Arasiṁge haravari yiśāsanake Arasu Aḷupi
dare sāvirada Oṁdu kavileya koṁdadōṣa Āgamadadōṣa A braṁhmara
dōṣa grāmajagati Oḷage Ārobaraḷupidare sāvirada Oṁdu kavile
ya koṁda dōṣa taṁma pitrugaḷa narakakke yettuvaru yiśāsanakke paṁ
ḍaridēva Oḍeyaru Oppa pradhāni viṭharasa Oḍeyara Oppa karaṇika bāya
ppagaḷa Oppa grāma hadināraṟa Oppa yi śāsanakke tripuruṣaru bāḷi
ya śiriya Ayivaru halara Oppa baradāta karaṇika bāyappagaḷu
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānānāṁjēyōnupāla pālanādacutaṁ
padaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā herētu vasuṁdharaṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimi . yi dharṁma ṁge Acutapadavi yi dharṁma
vanu keḍisabēkeṁdu Āḷu varige vāraṇāsiyali sāvira kavileya
koṁda dōṣa
yi śāsanakke maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
